name: FLUOR CORP
summary: PART I Fluor is dedicated to building a better world by applying our world-class expertise to solve our clients' greatest challenges. We deliver professional and technical solutions that emphasize safety, operational excellence and capital efficiency for our clients. Incorporated in Delaware in September 2000, Fluor and its predecessors have served clients for over 110 years, consistently supporting development and progress.
